name: Collections Compliance Pack
outcome: Linear two-step chain for debt-collection compliance review. Step 1 checks a declared call log against the Regulation F 12 CFR 1006.14(b) 7-in-7 and post-conversation quiet-period rebuttable presumptions. Step 2 checks a debt-validation-notice content-element checklist against 12 CFR 1006.34 / Model Form B-1 and computes the 30-day response-period math. Both presumption and completeness checks are over DECLARED inputs -- neither determines that harassment occurred or that a notice's disclosed amounts are accurate.
